title: MiniMax M3 explained in 8min..
summary: MiniMax M3 is a language model that adopts MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA) instead of full attention. The model includes optimizations for KV cache management and tiled I/O improvements that reduce latency in both prefill and decode stages of inference.
